steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage’s central contrast is that physical interaction with a product (touching) leads people to value it more. The decisive clue is the experimental result showing higher willingness to pay after tactile engagement.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B links tactile interaction in person to perceived value, mirroring the experiment’s conclusion. A, C, and D either reverse the relationship, speculate outside the text’s scope, or depend on unstated assumptions. That matches choice B — B is correct.
